headline: Q1 GDP: Top-Heavy, Bifurcated, And Concerning
summary: U.S. Q1 2026 GDP grew 2.0% as AI capex and federal spending masked a 3.5-year low savings rate and an 8% housing slump. Learn why rising debt costs threaten stability.
